versions.version_description: Includes passing chords. No bass unless its a leading tone. Original key. Intro and outro in cluded.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Intro: [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]G/A[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G/A[/ch]

Verse 1
[tab]           [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]Bm7[/ch]
Close your eyes, make a wish[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]F#m7[/ch]
And blow out the candle-light[/tab]
[tab][ch]D/F#[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]                  [ch]F#m7[/ch]
For to-night is just your night[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm/F[/ch]        [ch]Em7[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
We're gonna celebrate, all through the night[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]Bm7[/ch]
Pour the wine, light the fire[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]F#m7[/ch]
Girl your wish is my com-mand[/tab]
[tab][ch]D/F#[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]F#m7[/ch]
my sub-mit to your de-mands[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm/F[/ch]      [ch]Em7[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]
I will do anything, girl you need only ask[/tab]


Chorus
[tab]          [ch]D[/ch]
I'll make love to you[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Bm7[/ch]
Like you want me to[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Em7[/ch]
And I'll hold you tight[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]
Baby all through the night[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]D[/ch]
I'll make love to you[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Bm7[/ch]
When you want me to[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]
And I will not let go[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]
'Till you tell me to[/tab]


Verse 2
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]Bm7[/ch]
Girl re-lax, let's go slow[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]F#m7[/ch]
I ain't got nowhere to go[/tab]
[tab][ch]D/F#[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]               [ch]F#m7[/ch]
I'm just gonna con-centrate on you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm/F[/ch]         [ch]Em7[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
Girl are you ready, it's gonna be a long night[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]Bm7[/ch]
Throw your clothes on the floor[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]A[/ch]                   [ch]F#m7[/ch]
I'm gonna take my clothes off too[/tab]
[tab][ch]D/F#[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]                [ch]F#m7[/ch]
I've made plans to be with you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm/F[/ch]      [ch]Em7[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]
Girl what-ever you ask me, you know I can do[/tab]

Chorus

Verse 3
[tab]        [ch]F#m7[/ch]          [ch]B/D#[/ch]
Baby to-night is your night[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Em7[/ch]         A9sus
And I will do you right[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]           [ch]F#m7[/ch]         [ch]B/D#[/ch]
Just make a wish on your night[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Em7[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]
Anything that you ask[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C[/ch]                         [ch]G[/ch]
I will give you the love of your life, your life, your life[/tab]

Chorus x 2
